zh.Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandy,: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Chanteloup於1300年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特時，她的父親Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup35歲，母親Marguerite de Brucourt30歲。她和Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1372年7月18日在法國諾門迪曼其哈白享年72歲。

zh-hans.Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandy,: 法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Chanteloup于1300年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特时，她的父亲Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup35岁，母亲Marguerite de Brucourt30岁。她和Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1372年7月18日在法国諾門迪曼其哈白享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Chanteloup was born in 1300, in Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup, was 35 and her mother, Marguerite de Brucourt, was 30. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville. She died on 18 July 1372, in Hambye, Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Chanteloup est née en 1300, à Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Brucourt, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville. Elle est décédée le 18 juillet 1372, à Hambye, Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Chanteloup 1300 in Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup 35 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Brucourt 30. Sie hatte mit Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Juli 1372 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Chanteloup è nata il nel 1300 nel Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Brucourt, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville. Morì il 18 luglio 1372, nel Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.Chandeloup, Manche, Normandie, France: フランスノーマンディマンチェ
ja.Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandy,: フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスレス モウティエルス-ヒューバート
ja.Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディ
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Chanteloupが1300年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスレス モウティエルス-ヒューバートで生まれた時，父Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloupは35歳，母Marguerite de Brucourtは30歳であった。彼女はFoulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricquevilleとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1372年7月18日にフランスノーマンディマンチェハンブイで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Chanteloup(이)가 1300년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 레스 모우티어스-후버트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Brucourt(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 7월 18일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 햄비에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Chanteloup nasceu em 1300, em Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Brucourt, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville. Ela faleceu em 18 de julho de 1372, em Hambye, Manche, Normandie, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Chanteloup родилась в 1300 г. в местности лесь моутиирс-хубирт, калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Brucourt, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville. Она умерла 18 июля 1372 г. в местности хамби, манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Chanteloup nació en 1300, en Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert III de Chanteloup - Seigneur de Chanteloup, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Brucourt, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Foulques V Paynel - Baron de Hambye, Seigneur de Bricqueville. Murió el 18 de julio de 1372, en Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
